summary: Matrix‑like audio delivers a very good listening experience, capturing a first set played with gusto and a second set hailed as one of the band’s best of the era.
review: The recording is praised for its clear, matrix‑style sound that approaches the quality of a proper mix, while the performance itself receives high marks – the opening set is described as energetic and the second set as amazing, even rivaling the legendary 9/2/78 show. Reviewers overall recommend downloading this tape.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong positive comments on both performance and recording; limited detailed technical feedback keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as sounding almost like a good matrix mix – clear, balanced and pleasant to listen to. No major drop‑outs or noise reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set played with gusto; second set considered amazing and one of the best since 9/2/78, indicating a strong overall flow.
